channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Supreme Court Avoids Major Ruling on Social Media 'Censorship' Laws
item.description: In a unanimous decision, the Supreme Court declined to rule on the constitutionality of laws in Florida and Texas requiring online platforms to publish political speech they would otherwise remove
item.dc:creator: Issie Lapowsky, Fast Company

item.title: In the AI era, data is gold. And these companies are striking it rich
item.description: As businesses scramble to take advantage of artificial intelligence, they’re finding data makes all the difference in using AI effectively.
item.dc:creator: Steven Melendez, Fast Company

item.title: VMware Migrators: Nutanix Lures Disgruntled Customers with Hyperconverged Solutions
item.description: The transformed Nutanix, a pioneer in the hyperconverged infrastructure (HCI) space since 2011, is now targeting VMware dissatisfied customers seeking more efficient and agile IT infrastructures.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Supreme Court punts on Texas, Florida social media laws
item.description: The need for Supreme Court review grew more dire when federal appeals courts reached opposite conclusions.
item.dc:creator: Ella Lee, NewsNation

item.title: Millions of Infosys McCamish Users' Data Stolen in LockBit Ransomware Attack
item.description: A cyberattack on IMS's database has revealed a much larger scale of data theft, affecting millions of users, contradicting the initial estimate of 57,000 individuals affected
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Supreme Court punts on Texas, Florida social media laws
item.description: The Supreme Court on Monday wiped lower court rulings regarding two state laws aimed at barring social media companies from banning users based on their political views, kicking the major First Amendment challenge down the road.
item.dc:creator: Ella Lee, The Hill

item.title: How to trace and block anonymous calls
item.description: Do you want to prevent scam calls? Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson discusses how to block hidden IDs on your phone.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Microsoft AI CEO claims any content published online is "freeware" to help train AI — and people are not happy
item.description: Although AI is trained on data published online, Microsoft AI CEO still sees the need for greater governance.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Alibaba Cloud Shifts Focus to Southeast Asia, Closes Key Data Centers in Sydney and Mumbai
item.description: Alibaba Cloud is closing its data centers in Sydney and Mumbai as it pivots to focus on Southeast Asia and its new location in Mexico, a strategic move to expand its reach in the region.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Alibaba to cease data center operations in India and Australia
item.description: Alibaba’s cloud computing unit, otherwise known as Alibaba Cloud or Aliyun, has decided to cease data center operations in India and Australia.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: How smaller businesses can reimagine brand building with generative AI
item.description: Generating and maintaining awareness is notoriously challenging for small businesses, often working with limited in-house resources and without the budget for external marketing support.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Why smaller businesses need AI PCs to make hybrid work a success
item.description: As hybrid working increasingly becomes the norm, businesses must ensure their digital strategy is enabling high quality collaboration in order to succeed.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: European Union accuses Facebook owner Meta of breaking digital rules with paid ad-free option
item.description: European Union regulators have accused social media company Meta Platforms of breaching the bloc’s new digital competition rulebook by forcing Facebook and Instagram users to choose between seeing ads or paying to avoid them.
item.dc:creator: Kelvin Chan, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Autonomous trash-gobbling robot boat wages war on waterway waste
item.description: Tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson provides the details on the Class 3 Clearbot: an autonomous vessel for efficient marine trash/plant removal.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: 8 AI-powered apps that’ll actually save you time
item.description: You can’t open your eyes these days without seeing something about generative AI and all the reasons it’s, like, totally gonna revolutionize the way you work. And yet, call me surly, but most of the AI tools out there at this point seem far less impressive in practice than they do on paper.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Windows 11 Insider Previews: What’s in the latest build?
item.description: The Windows 11 2023 Update has been released, but behind the scenes, Microsoft is constantly working to improve the newest version of Windows.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: 2024 InfoWorld Technology Awards Open for Nominations in Software, Cloud, Data Analytics & AI
item.description: The 2024 InfoWorld Technology of the Year Awards recognize innovative products across 26 categories, including software development, cloud computing, data analytics, and AI and machine learning. Now accepting nominations.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: 7 steps to improve analytics for data-driven organizations
item.description: When leaders say they want to be a data-driven organization, a key objective is empowering business people to use data, predictive models, generative AI capabilities, and data visualizations to improve decision-making.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Cities most targeted for travel booking scams
item.description: Kurt "CyberGuy" Knutsson takes a look at the five travel destinations most frequently targeted by cybercriminals through online booking scams.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Meta's AI-Generated Avatars for Instagram Creators on the Horizon
item.description: Meta announces the development of AI-generated avatars for Instagram creators, with AI appearing before the creator's name followed by a 'beta' tag
item.dc:creator: Anna Kutz, NewsNation

item.title: Will China try to make a land grab on the moon?
item.description: “A lot of their so-called civilian space program is a military program. And I think, in effect, we are in a race,” says NASA Administrator Bill Nelson.
item.dc:creator: Rich Johnson, NewsNation

item.title: Cape Cod Dolphin Stranding: Rescuers Contain Dozens of Stranded Dolphins in Shallow Waters
item.description: After a mass stranding of 125 dolphins, animal rescuers work to contain the creatures in shallow waters around Cape Cod, prioritizing their safety and well-being
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Too many passwords to remember? Here's what you can do
item.description: According to some unscientific studies, the average person has hundreds of passwords. That's a lot to keep track of.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Opinion: Big tech companies are burning through reservoirs of trust with AI
item.description: Is generative AI a useful productivity tool or a series of overhyped, intrusive products that consume vital resources?
item.dc:creator: Irina Raicu, The Mercury News

item.title: The Supreme Court nears the end of another momentous term. A decision on Trump's immunity looms
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — In the last 10 days of June, on a frenetic pace of its own making, the Supreme Court touched a wide swath of American society in a torrent of decisions on abortion, guns, the environment, health, the opioid crisis, securities fraud and homelessness.
item.dc:creator: MARK SHERMAN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: TikTok's Viral Recipe Trend is Redefining Cooking Habits
item.description: Discover how short-form video sharing app TikTok is revolutionizing cooking methods with its viral recipe content, influencing home cooks worldwide
item.dc:creator: Food Drink Life, The Mercury News

item.title: Preventing Skills Obsolescence: States Ramp Up Training for Workers Amid AI Advancements
item.description: As artificial intelligence becomes integral to the workplace, states are proactively investing in programs that help workers upgrade their tech skills and stay relevant, ensuring they don't get left behind by machines that are rapidly becoming more intelligent.
item.dc:creator: SUSAN HAIGH, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: EU commissioner slams Apple Intelligence delay
item.description: If you believe European Commission Vice President Margrethe Vestager, Apple’s decision to delay introduction of its Apple Intelligence AI is a “stunning declaration” of its own anticompetitive behavior.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: AI success: Real or hallucination?
item.description: Ever consider how much of AI is a hallucination? Not how much AI output is hallucination, but rather how much of what we hear or read about it is genuine? Could it be that AI success is mostly hype, and that all the hype may be hurting the technology rather than helping? Enterprises need to get to t
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: The Supreme Court rules for Biden administration in a social media dispute with conservative states
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The Supreme Court on Wednesday sided with the Biden administration in a dispute with Republican-led states over how far the federal government can go to combat controversial social media posts on topics including COVID-19 and election security.
item.dc:creator: MARK SHERMAN, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: A Vatican Radio territory in north Rome once blamed for electro-smog will become a solar farm
item.description: ROME (AP) — Pope Francis decreed Wednesday that an area of northern Rome, long the source of controversy because of electromagnetic waves emitted by Vatican Radio towers there, will now house a field of solar panels to fuel Vatican City. Citing the Vatican’s pledge in U.N.
item.dc:creator: NICOLE WINFIELD, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Where tech, politics & giving meet: CEO Nicole Taylor considers Silicon Valley's busy intersection
item.description: Nicole Taylor has an insider's view of philanthropic trends from her seat as the president and CEO of the Silicon Valley Community Foundation.
item.dc:creator: THALIA BEATY, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: AI image-generator startup Stability AI looks for reshoot with new CEO and investor group
item.description: LONDON (AP) — The troubled artificial intelligence company behind image-generator Stable Diffusion is looking for a reshoot with a new CEO and a surge of investment from a group that includes Sean Parker, Facebook’s former president and Napster's co-founder.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Indonesia won't pay an $8 million ransom after a cyberattack compromised its national data center
item.description: JAKARTA, Indonesia (AP) — Indonesia's national data center has been compromised by a hacking group asking for a $8 million ransom that the government says it won't pay.
item.dc:creator: NINIEK KARMINI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Indonesia won't pay an $8 million ransom after a cyberattack compromised the national data center
item.description: JAKARTA, Indonesia (AP) — Indonesia's national data center has been compromised by a hacking group asking for a $8 million ransom that the government says it won't pay.
item.dc:creator: NINIEK KARMINI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Music record labels sue AI song-generators Suno and Udio for copyright infringement
item.description: BOSTON (AP) — Big record companies are suing artificial intelligence song-generators Suno and Udio for copyright infringement, alleging that the AI music startups are exploiting the recorded works of artists from Chuck Berry to Mariah Carey.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Apple becomes first target of EU's new digital competition rules aimed at big tech
item.description: LONDON (AP) — European Union regulators on Monday leveled their first charges under the bloc’s new digital competition rulebook, accusing Apple of preventing app makers from pointing users to cheaper options outside its App Store.
item.dc:creator: KELVIN CHAN, Associated Press, Fox 5
